title: Karnataka State Open University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Karnataka State Open University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Karnataka State Open University Result 2026 Out for I Year B.A and I Semester M.A Sociology Oct/Nov 2025 exams on the official website - ksouportal.com on 16.04.2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the KSOU result

content.text: Karnataka State Open University (KSOU) has officially released the KSOU Result 2026 for I Year B.A (2024-25 July Cycle and repeaters) and I Semester M.A Sociology (2024-25 January Cycle and repeaters) for the Oct/Nov 2025 examination session. The university has published the provisional revaluation results online for the concerned UG and PG courses on 16 April 2026. KSOU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - ksouportal.com. Students can check and download their KSOU BA and MA results by visiting the result portal and entering their registration number or other required login credentials. After downloading the provisional marksheet, candidates must carefully verify their personal details, subject-wise marks, and revaluation status, and contact the Registrar Evaluation or KSOU Academic Platform in case of any discrepancies, especially regarding internal assessment.

sections.heading: Karnataka State Open University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: KSOU has published the latest provisional revaluation results for I Year BA and I Semester MA Sociology for the Oct/Nov 2025 exams under the 2024-25 academic cycles. Students from the July and January cycles, including repeaters, can now check their updated marks online through the official KSOU result portal. These KSOU Result 2026 updates allow candidates to download their provisional revaluation results for reference and future admission or academic processes.

sections.heading: Karnataka State Open University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: KSOU has activated the direct online result portal for students to check KSOU Result 2026 for I Year BA and I Semester MA Sociology revaluation results for the Oct/Nov 2025 exams. Candidates can use the official KSOU result link to instantly view or download their provisional revaluation marks by entering their registration details. Students enrolled in the 2024-25 July and January cycles, including repeaters, should use the link below to access their KSOU UG and PG semester results.

links.label: I SEMESTER M.A-HISTORY (2024-25 January Cycle & Repeaters) Provisional Revaluation Result EXAM OCT/NOV - 2025 Announced on 16.04.2026.ANY QUERIES RELATED TO INTERNAL ASSESSMENT CONTACT REGISTRAR EVALUATION/KSOU ACADEMIC PLATFORM.

JOURNALISM (DIJ) (2024-25 July Cycle & Repeaters) Provisional Result EXAM OCT/NOV - 2025 Announced on 16.04.2026.ANY QUERIES RELATED TO INTERNAL ASSESSMENT CONTACT REGISTRAR EVALUATION/KSOU ACADEMIC PLATFORM.

PG DIPLOMA/CERTIFICATE IN HUMAN RESOURCE MANAGEMENT (PGCHRM) (2024-25 July Cycle & Repeaters) Provisional Result EXAM OCT/NOV - 2025 Announced on 16.04.2026.ANY QUERIES RELATED TO INTERNAL ASSESSMENT CONTACT REGISTRAR EVALUATION/KSOU ACADEMIC PLATFORM.

I YEAR B.A (2024-25 July Cycle & Repeaters) Provisional Revaluation Result EXAM OCT/NOV - 2025 Announced on 15.04.2026.ANY QUERIES RELATED TO INTERNAL ASSESSMENT CONTACT REGISTRAR EVALUATION/KSOU ACADEMIC PLATFORM.

I SEMESTER M.A-SOCIOLOGY (2024-25 January Cycle & Repeaters) Provisional Revaluation Result EXAM OCT/NOV - 2025 Announced on 15.04.2026.ANY QUERIES RELATED TO INTERNAL ASSESSMENT CONTACT REGISTRAR EVALUATION/KSOU ACADEMIC PLATFORM.

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check and download KSOU Result 2026 online from the official portal:

items: Visit the official KSOU result portal at https://ksouportal.com/results/ksouresult.aspx.
On the results page, look for the latest links for I Year BA or I Semester MA Sociology Oct/Nov 2025 provisional revaluation results.
Click on the relevant result link to proceed to the result access page.
Enter your registration number or other required login credentials in the given fields.
Submit the details to view your KSOU Result 2026 on the screen.
Download or print the provisional result for future reference and verification.
For any queries related to internal assessment, contact the Registrar Evaluation or KSOU Academic Platform as notified on the result page.
